description_long: This monumental obelisk features a multi-tiered circular base adorned with intricate sculptural figures and reliefs, giving it a grand and historic appearance. The central shaft rises vertically and is topped by a prominent statue of a robed figure holding an object aloft, likely symbolizing liberty or victory. The base is heavily ornamented with classical motifs, including seated and standing human figures, shields, and decorative panels. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from stone, with weathering and patina visible on the surfaces, and the upper statue is darker, possibly bronze or another metal. The lowest tier is encircled by a broad, slightly raised platform, which is also decorated and may serve as a gathering or viewing area. The overall design is reminiscent of famous European civic monuments, blending neoclassical and allegorical elements.
description: A grand, multi-tiered stone obelisk with ornate sculptural figures and a dark statue atop, set on a wide circular base with classical decorations.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front-facing sculptural figures and the prominent statue at the top, with clear visibility of the detailed reliefs and the broad circular base.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side figures and the curvature of the base are more visible, with some ornamental details partially obscured by shadow.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear sculptural groupings and the layered structure of the base, with the upper statue still visible but less frontal.
description_view_3: This view shows another side of the obelisk, revealing additional figures and decorative panels, as well as the continuity of the circular platform.
attribute_ornamentation: Extensive ornamentation including sculpted human figures, shields, and relief panels on the base and shaft, with a large statue at the top. The style is neoclassical and allegorical.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, multi-tiered circular platform with steps and elaborate sculptural groups, including seated and standing figures, shields, and decorative reliefs. The structure is primarily stone with detailed carvings.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is crowned by a large, dark statue of a robed figure holding an object aloft, likely made of bronze, with a dramatic and symbolic pose.
attribute_surrounding_features: A broad, circular platform surrounds the obelisk, possibly serving as a gathering area. No vegetation or fencing is visible.
